name: benchmarkiq-vqa-template
description: BenchmarkIQ bank VQA portal with local DeepSeek commentary proxy.

scripts.test:deepseek: node --check server/deepseek-commentary-proxy.js && node --check js/04-ui-selection.js && node --check js/12-ai-narrative.js && node --check js/33-llm-commentary.js && node tests/deepseek_proxy_contract.test.js && node tests/llm_commentary_contract.test.js && node tests/auto_model_generation_contract.test.js && node tests/research_consulting_commentary_contract.test.js && node tests/evidence_map_commentary_contract.test.js
scripts.test:data-bridge: node --check js/05-analysis.js && node tests/launch_bootstrap_nonblocking_contract.test.js && node tests/ready_data_layer_contract.test.js && node tests/ready_portal_bridge_contract.test.js && node tests/topic_data_bridge_contract.test.js && node tests/data_validation_bridge_contract.test.js && node tests/sprint11a_ready_governance_contract.test.js
scripts.test:layered-pipeline: node --check js/05-analysis.js && node --check js/12-ai-narrative.js && node --check js/35-report-model.js && node --check js/36-layered-fact-model.js && node tests/ready_portal_bridge_contract.test.js && node tests/topic_data_bridge_contract.test.js && node tests/layered_pipeline_contract.test.js && node tests/report_model_contract.test.js && node tests/llm_commentary_contract.test.js && node tests/evidence_map_commentary_contract.test.js
scripts.test:rewrite-orchestrator: npm run test:evidence-pack-lineage && node --check js/37-deepseek-rewrite-orchestrator.js && node tests/deepseek_rewrite_orchestrator_contract.test.js && node tests/sprint12_deepseek_protocol_contract.test.js && node tests/portal_confirm_navigation_contract.test.js && node tests/target_scoped_rewrite_cache_contract.test.js && node tests/local_commentary_provider_contract.test.js && node tests/local_commentary_strength_contract.test.js && node tests/local_template_ui_copy_contract.test.js && node tests/report_local_commentary_bridge_contract.test.js && npm run test:deepseek && npm run test:layered-pipeline
